description: Fitz and Radcliffe, joined by AIDA, have a thoughtful discussion about her ultimate purpose as a safeguard — not a weapon — intended to protect agents as a decoy in the field. Fitz’s unease persists, especially regarding potential misuse by S.H.I.E.L.D.'s leadership. The two scientists agree to keep AIDA secret until she's perfect, cementing their pact of secrecy.
location: Dr. Holden Radcliffe's house (New York / Radcliffe lab)

transcript.line: This could be very dangerous. So much could go wrong.
